summary: Mission v13.0 - Stripe Connect & Vente de Packs. Backend APIs PASS (100% - 20/20 tests). Frontend code review validated. Boutique tab implementation correct. Anti-régression: 22 reservations ✅
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/credit-packs returns visible packs (4 packs available)
✅ POST /api/stripe/create-credit-checkout validates pack_id, X-User-Email header, and denies Super Admin
✅ POST /api/webhook/stripe endpoint exists and handles credit_purchase type (lines 2172-2231)
✅ GET /api/credit-transactions returns transaction history (Admin: all, Coach: own)
✅ CoachDashboard.js line 3832: 'boutique' tab added for non-Super Admin coaches
✅ CoachDashboard.js lines 536-552: loadCreditPacks useEffect loads packs on mount
✅ CoachDashboard.js lines 555-572: handleBuyPack creates Stripe checkout session
✅ CoachDashboard.js lines 6441-6534: Boutique tab UI with pack cards, prices in CHF, and Acheter buttons
✅ Webhook sends email notifications to coach and Super Admin on successful purchase

success_rate.frontend: Code review validated - Boutique tab correctly implemented

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v13.0 validated. Stripe credit checkout flow: 1) GET /api/credit-packs lists visible packs, 2) POST /api/stripe/create-credit-checkout creates session, 3) Webhook /api/webhook/stripe handles credit_purchase type, adds credits and logs transaction, 4) GET /api/credit-transactions shows history. UI: Boutique tab visible in CoachDashboard for non-Super Admin partners only. 4 packs exist: test (100 credits/0 CHF), Pack Starter (100 credits/49 CHF), Pack Pro (150 credits/99 CHF). No actual Stripe payment tested per requirements.
